assessment.state: early demand signal with significant delivery risk
assessment.key_takeaway: The main issue appears to be implementation and customization complexity rather than lack of interest.
signals: Missed calls are a meaningful pain point for a subset of HVAC owners.
Some owners are willing to enter a paid pilot.
At least one owner converted to payment.
A custom workflow caused churn after setup.

recommended_next_experiment.name: Standardized paid pilot for missed-call pain
recommended_next_experiment.hypothesis: HVAC owners with clear missed-call pain will pay for a simple standardized pilot if setup is fast and does not require custom workflow design.
design: Target only prospects who explicitly report missed-call pain.
Offer a fixed-scope pilot focused on one narrow use case.
Avoid custom workflows during the experiment.
Use a single onboarding path and a single success metric.
success_criteria: Secure at least 3 paid pilots from the next qualified conversations.
Most pilots launch using the same setup template.
